title: Rusty Craft
description: A warm brown and grey themed pack with unique GUIs
body:
## ✨ Overview  
This resource pack focuses solely on transforming Minecraft’s GUI, but the result goes far beyond a simple visual tweak! 😍 Every menu and widget is redesigned with a stylish brown-and-grey palette, giving the interface a warm, refined, and professional look.  

---
### 🎨 Unique Design
Each part of the UI comes with its own handcrafted style. From the main menu to the inventory and hotbar — everything feels custom-made and cohesive, while still offering visual variety to keep things interesting.

---
### 🛠 Better Than the Default
This isn’t just a simplification — it’s a complete user experience upgrade. Everything is cleaner, more readable, and more immersive, so even after hours of play, the visuals still feel fresh and eye-pleasing.

---
📋 Features  
🔸 Complete GUI overhaul – Every single menu and widget redesigned.  
🔸 Brown & grey color palette – Warm, refined, and easy on the eyes.  
🔸 Unique design per screen – No copy-paste layouts; every GUI feels special.  
🔸 Improved readability – Text and icons are easier to see and distinguish.  
🔸 Handcrafted details – Gives the interface a polished, premium feel.
